nodes.label: Return full Jira ticket records linked to a session (JOIN with jira_tickets).
nodes.norm_label: return full jira ticket records linked to a session (join with jira_tickets).

nodes.label: 13. What Forge Should Not Look Like
nodes.norm_label: 13. what forge should not look like

nodes.label: Graphify Navigation & Update Rules
nodes.rationale: Specifies rules for querying, navigating, and updating the knowledge graph using graphify to minimize context size and maintain the graph automatically.

nodes.label: Sanctum App Shell Layout
nodes.rationale: A persistent desktop shell with 5 key layout regions (header, navigation rail, workspace, context rail, status bar) that continuously communicate system state.

nodes.label: Sanctum Visual System
nodes.rationale: A precise, dense, technical tone utilizing dark navy backgrounds, cyan primary accents, magenta secondary accents, and thin borders, avoiding generic SaaS aesthetics.

nodes.label: Sanctum Typography System
nodes.rationale: Uses Orbitron for uppercase headers, Rajdhani/Inter for body, and Share Tech Mono / JetBrains Mono for numbers and logs to optimize scan density.

nodes.label: Sanctum Color Palette
nodes.rationale: Sets precise Hex values (#080b12 for bg, #0d1220 for panels, #00e5ff for primary accent) to encode status rather than serve as mere decoration.

nodes.label: Right Rail Drawer Interaction
nodes.rationale: Right rail icons toggle a slow-sliding drawer covering left to right, closeable via escape or 'X'.

nodes.label: Local Database and Authentication Surface
nodes.rationale: Requires SQLite under ~/.savant/{{appname}}.db for local session and login persistence, alongside a modal API key login.

nodes.label: Product Manager Flow
nodes.rationale: Allows hierarchical navigation (Projects -> Features -> PRDs) with state locking (draft/final) for product definitions.

nodes.label: Athena Context Awareness
nodes.rationale: Dynamically builds contextual scopes based on active UI tabs and selected entities to feed into the Athena LLM gateway.

nodes.label: Right Context Rail Detail Inspector Design Pattern
nodes.norm_label: right context rail detail inspector design pattern
